details: repo_structure: reports/board/ directory does not exist. All other expected top-level directories (src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/) and reports/audit/ are present.
governance_contracts_present: reports/board/ directory missing. memory_bank/ has key docs, .cursor/automations/ exists with README and specs, reports/audit/ exists.

no_deprecated_dirs: moltbot/ directory exists at repo root with active Python code (sentinel.py, promotion_discipline.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py, board.py). Per CSA findings (CSA_FINDINGS_clawdbot_removal.md, CSA_VERDICT_clawdbot_removal.json), clawdbot/moltbot components were slated for removal.

no_clawdbot_moltbot: Moltbot references found in active code/config files (excluding reports/audit/docs): moltbot/sentinel.py, moltbot/promotion_discipline.py, moltbot/orchestrator.py, moltbot/memory_evolution.py, moltbot/board.py, scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py
